body.title: Retire worker_daemon.sh — add disabled sentinel + remove claim
body.result: worker_daemon.sh retired: exits immediately with redirect message; cc_queue.py claim already raises LegacyDirectClaimError
body.description:
worker_daemon.sh is suspended as of 2026-05-25 (PID killed). Formally retire it: add a DISABLED/ARCHIVED header comment and comment out the main polling loop so it can never be accidentally restarted. Remove the `claim` CLI command from cc_queue.py — any caller gets a clear LegacyDirectClaimError explaining the mechanism is removed (per standing instruction: 'no claiming ever from anybody. remove all that code. when it gets called, throw an exception that it is no longer supported').

**Affected files:** ~/TheIgors/lab/claudecode/worker_daemon.sh, ~/TheIgors/lab/claudecode/cc_queue.py
**Design rules:** no-claiming (standing instruction); /query-ticket is the canonical read-only path
**Scope boundary:** sentinel + claim command removal only; NOT build ADC queue device; NOT update /sprint-ticket skill (that's T-adc-queue-no-claiming, gated on the device)
**Test plan:** `python3 ~/TheIgors/lab/claudecode/cc_queue.py claim T-test 2>&1` → output contains 'LegacyDirectClaimError' or 'no longer supported'; worker_daemon.sh loop is commented out
